name: NASM PT Online — Redirect A/B/C (organic browser runner)
_note: Drives real browser visitors to the experiment URL. The live Optimizely snippet buckets each fresh visitor and (for B/C) redirects to the variation's page; the variation is read from the final URL and confirmed via window.optimizely state. Events fire organically.
